# hindclaw_bank_policy (Resource)

Manages a bank policy document. One policy per bank.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "hindclaw_bank_policy" "alpha" {
  bank_id = "agent-alpha"
  document = jsonencode({
    version = "1"
    statements = [
      {
        effect    = "allow"
        actions   = ["recall", "retain"]
        resources = ["*"]
      }
    ]
  })
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bank_id` (String) Bank identifier. Immutable after creation.
- `document` (String) Policy document as a JSON string.
